diffCoverage.notes: Verified the QR login change stays within scope.allowedLayers [types, zalo, command]; zca-rust + reqwest stay confined to zalo. lib.rs/Cargo wiring is owned by the secure-cred-store / session-manager bundles in the current diff.

findings.evidence: run_qr_login wraps zca-rust API::login_qr and maps LoginQREvent -> the pure types::QrLoginEvent DTO inside the zalo layer; types/qr.rs is pure data with no zca-rust dependency; command/start_qr_login depends on zalo + types only and emits the non-secret event + AccountProfile. zca-rust and reqwest stay confined to zalo. Forward-only order preserved.

summary: Architecture review (reconciliation): QR login keeps zca-rust/reqwest confined to the zalo layer, types/qr.rs is pure data, and command orchestrates via the lower layers only — within scope.allowedLayers [types, zalo, command]. Forward-only layering intact. Approve.
